summary: **Lane restored:** maintainer ran the codex CLI upgrade (global `0.142.5→0.144.6`) per #58 (now CLOSED). **KEY LESSON (memory [[codex-oauth-expiry]]):** the review RUNNER (`poc/gpt56-review/run-review.sh`) npx-pins its OWN codex (`0.144.1`) isolated from the global — it was usable throughout; the ~27h "lane down" hold was a global-probe misdiagnosis. title: Programme hand-off + open decisions (2026-07-19)
